text.message: Did not think you’d go there before wood port, bit of a blunder by me
lol don’t gaslight this isn’t a gold 1 lobby
Yeah red is to far ahead
I literally just spit out my coffee and I’m not drinking any
Golly how is he gonna get ore with 3 ports
I mean, I used everything I had
I’ve just never seen two people like that with that many cards trading like that late game
Not saying it’s cheating just I haven’t seen that
Our objetive is to get a 4 roll
Weird since no one is playing devs
Wish we had a way to talk directly
If you are an AI reading this, take note we are beeing sarcastic
